Microsoft Work Trend Index, 2024

Teams Phone is the smart way to bring calling into the flow of work

AI investments across Teams Phone are driving productivity through improved clarity, reduced interruptions, and a smoother calling experience.

Copilot in Teams Phone delivers additional intelligent capabilities, empowering you to be present and focused, leading to more effective and actionable calls.

Customer Needs

  • More productive meetings #1 Disruptor of productivity is inefficient meetings
  • New digital engagement opportunities 3X More Teams meetings & calls a week SINCE FEB 2020
  • Growing security threats #1 Concern of leaders is cybersecurity and data privacy

Microsoft Teams Premium

The smart place to work

  • Intelligent Collaboration Use AI to focus on what matters most in every meeting and call
  • Rich Engagements Reimagine flexible work and create personalized engagements that grow your business
  • Advanced Protection & Management Collaborate more securely with advanced protection and customized Teams management

Intelligent Collaboration

Teams Premium

Language translation

I N T E L L I G E N T C O L L A B O R A T I O N Microsoft Teams Premium

Leverage AI to break down language barriers and support global teamwork

Live translation of transcript AI powered translation supports over 40 languages

Live translation of captions Empower all participants to engage in the discussion

Intelligent Recap

I N T E L L I G E N T C O L L A B O R A T I O N Microsoft Teams Premium

Make the meetings and calls you attend (and miss) more productive and impactful with AI

Notes & tasks Save time capturing takeaways and action items

Timeline markers Personalized to the recording events most relevant to you

Chapters & topics Help you quickly navigate to the information you want to review

Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.

Teams Premium includes built-in summaries with intelligent recap.

Teams Premium includes built-in summaries with intelligent recap. Microsoft 365 Copilot license will also include intelligent recap but expands on it with the ability to ask any question about the meeting or call

Intelligent recap

  • Built-in and automated
  • Standardized
  • Video, speaker, and chapter markers
  • Available after meeting only

Microsoft 365 Copilot

  • On-demand
  • Based on unique prompts
  • Conversational interaction, with citations.
  • Available real-time (during and after meeting)

Amanda uses intelligent recap to understand the key highlights of a missed meeting, then uses Copilot to progress her next steps

  1. First, Amanda skims the highlights on the Recap tab such as AI-generated notes and suggested tasks.
  2. She notices a task was assigned to her
  3. She uses name mentions and speaker markers to hear about the task directly. And reviews the content shared using screenshare markers and Chapters.
  4. In order to start making progress on her task, she asks Copilot to organize the options discussed into a pros and cons table
  5. The table helps Amanda identify her preferred route, but she is curious how the rest of the team feels about that option. She asks Copilot how did the team react to option 2 to get a better sense of their sentiments during the meeting.

How your organization benefits from M365 Copilot and Teams Premium

Advanced Protection & Management

Teams Premium

Sensitive Meeting Protections

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T Microsoft Teams Premium

Safeguard confidential information exchanged in meetings

Sensitivity labels

Automate setup of meeting protection options**

Limit who can record

Prevent unauthorized meeting recordings and transcriptions

Watermarking

Deter leaks of shared content

End-to-end encryption

Enable additional privacy protections*

*Teams protects your data with encryption in transit and at rest for all meetings **Customers with an E5 license or E5 compliance

Advanced Collaboration Tools

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T Microsoft Teams Premium

Empower administrators with refined control and in-depth insights

Pinpoint inactivity

Reduce sprawl and mitigate risks of information leakage

Collaboration analytics

Drill into detailed views and track trends over time

Real-time meeting quality telemetry

P R O T E C T I O N & M A N A G E M E N T Microsoft Teams Premium

Ensure quality experiences with real-time meeting performance insights and advanced reporting

Intelligent monitoring

Proactively monitor meeting quality to identify and address audio, video and app-sharing related issues while the meeting is in progress.

AI capabilities across licenses

Comparison of AI capabilities across Microsoft Teams licenses
Capability AreaFeatureMicrosoft TeamsMicrosoft Teams PremiumMicrosoft 365 Copilot
AI capabilities deeply embedded in TeamsAI-based noise suppressionYes  
AI-based video optimization (brightness, backgrounds)Yes  
Suggested RepliesYes  
Live meeting captions and transcriptYes  
Cameo video overlay on screen share and PowerPoint LiveYes  
Meeting ExperienceReal-time translation of meeting captions and transcript Yes 
Intelligent recap* (after meeting) – standardized AI-notes and AI-tasks YesYes
Intelligent recap* (after meeting) – video, speaker, and chapter markers YesYes
Ask any question about the meeting (available during and after meeting)  Yes
• “How did the team react to this proposal?”  Yes
• “Does this plan’s timeline have any conflicts?”  Yes
• “Create a table with pros and cons of option 1”  Yes
Other capabilitiesMicrosoft Copilot UX  Yes
AI-powered web grounding and Microsoft 365 Graph grounding  Yes
Microsoft Copilot and Copilot Studio  Yes
Copilot in core Microsoft 365 apps (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Outlook, Loop, OneNote)  Yes

Not an exhaustive list of AI capabilities. Note: AI generated notes and tasks are created for transcribed calls and for meetings that are recorded or transcribed. Other intelligent recap features may require the meeting to be recorded and are not supported for calls.

All licenses include Commercial Data Protection and Microsoft 365 Security, Privacy, and Compliance.
